params.name: apikey
params.description: ZenRows API key for authentication.

params.name: url
params.description: Target URL to scrape (URL-encoded).

params.name: mode
params.description: Set to `auto` to enable Adaptive Stealth Mode anti-bot bypass.

params.name: js_render
params.description: Render the page in a real browser before returning content.

params.name: premium_proxy
params.description: Route the request through the residential proxy pool.

params.name: proxy_country
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy geolocation.

params.name: custom_headers
params.description: Forward custom HTTP headers from the request to the target site.

params.name: session_id
params.description: Numeric session identifier that pins the same proxy IP across requests for up to 10 minutes.

params.name: js_instructions
params.description: Base64-encoded list of browser instructions (click, scroll, wait, fill, evaluate) to execute after page load.

params.name: wait
params.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds after page load before returning the response.

params.name: wait_for
params.description: CSS selector to wait for before returning the response.

params.name: block_resources
params.description: Comma-separated list of resource types to block during rendering (e.g. `image,stylesheet,font`).

params.name: css_extractor
params.description: URL-encoded JSON object mapping field names to CSS selectors for structured extraction.

params.name: autoparse
params.description: Automatically parse the page into a structured JSON object using ZenRows' built-in extractors.

params.name: json_response
params.description: Return the response wrapped in JSON, capturing network requests, XHRs, and metadata.

params.name: response_type
params.description: Convert the rendered response into another format.

params.name: screenshot
params.description: Capture an above-the-fold screenshot of the page.

params.name: screenshot_fullpage
params.description: Capture a full-page screenshot of the page.

params.name: screenshot_selector
params.description: CSS selector to scope the screenshot to a single element.

params.name: screenshot_format
params.description: Output format for screenshot bytes.

params.name: screenshot_quality
params.description: JPEG quality from 1 to 100 (only with `screenshot_format=jpeg`).

params.name: outputs
params.description: Comma-separated list of structured outputs to extract (e.g. `emails,phone_numbers,links,images`).

params.name: original_status
params.description: Return the target site's original HTTP status code instead of ZenRows' normalized 200/4xx/5xx.

params.name: allowed_status_codes
params.description: Comma-separated list of HTTP status codes for which content should still be returned.

items.docs: Fetch and scrape any URL, optionally rendering JavaScript and routing through ZenRows' anti-bot, premium proxy, or geo-targeted proxy pool. Returns the rendered HTML by default, or a markdown/plaintext/PDF/JSON payload or a screenshot when the corresponding flags are set.

info.name: Scrape a URL With a POST Body

params.name: apikey
params.description: ZenRows API key for authentication.

params.name: url
params.description: Target URL to scrape.

items.docs: Variant of the scrape endpoint that forwards a request body to the target URL, used to scrape pages that only respond to POST.
